## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was this needed?

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/CD

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Desktop build/check run (if desktop code changed)
- [ ] Manual smoke test completed

## Screenshots / Recordings

Include for UI changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] I read `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] I updated docs if behavior changed
- [ ] I added/updated tests when needed
- [ ] I verified no secrets were introduced
